name: Slack Thinking Steps
description: Exposes Slack's native Thinking Steps API as agent tools: slack_stream_start, slack_stream_task, slack_stream_stop. The model publishes a plan, updates steps with reasoning as it works, then writes its final answer normally. Reads the Slack bot token from channels.slack.botToken in openclaw.json or the SLACK_BOT_TOKEN environment variable.

providerAuthEnvVars.SLACK_BOT_TOKEN: Slack bot token (xoxb-...). Optional if channels.slack.botToken is configured.
